name: Whole Wheat Batter Bread
recipeInstructions:
This recipe makes 2 loaves of bread. For one loaf, use 2 packages yeast instead of 3 and halve all other ingredients. Wheat germ and soy flour can be omitted. Preheat oven to warm setting at the lowest temperature.
1. In a very large bowl, dissolve yeast in 3/4 cup very warm water.
2. Stir in honey-molasses.
3. Coat loaf pans with margarine and flour.
4. Add oil, 2-1/2 cups warm water, 2 tablespoons salt, and yeast mixture to the flour.
5. Mix until well combined. The dough should be sticky; if too runny, add more flour.
6. Pour batter into prepared pans, smoothing the top and ensuring it is evenly distributed in corners.
7. Cover with a hot, wet towel and let rise in a warm place for about 20 minutes, or until nearly reaching the edge of the pan.
8. Check the bread at intervals to ensure it hasn't risen beyond the pan's lip.
9. Bake at 450°F (232°C) for about 40 minutes.
10. Remove from pans immediately and cool on racks.
